title: ICAI Releases Revised Handbook on Finalisation of Accounts with GST Perspective (June 2026)
content:
# ICAI Releases Revised Handbook on Finalisation of Accounts with GST Perspective (June 2026)

Fellow CAs, ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne **Finalisation of Accounts with GST Perspective** par apni revised Handbook release ki hai on June 23, 2026.

This revised Handbook is a crucial resource for professionals, providing updated guidance for integrating GST compliance into the financial statement finalisation process.

*   This Second Edition of the Handbook is comprehensively updated up to May 31, 2026, to incorporate the latest legislative, procedural, and technological developments under the GST regime.
*   It aims to provide detailed guidance on integrating GST compliance into the financial statement finalisation process.
*   The publication emphasizes that GST compliance is no longer just a tax function but a critical component of financial reporting and statutory audits.
*   Key aspects covered include the reconciliation of turnover, Input Tax Credit (ITC), tax liabilities, reversals, refunds, and GST disclosures with the books of accounts before finalisation of financial statements.
*   Even though mandatory GST Audit under Section 35(5) of the CGST Act has been discontinued, the Handbook addresses the requirement for taxpayers with an aggregate turnover exceeding ₹5 crore to file a self-certified reconciliation statement in Form GSTR-9C along with the Annual Return.
*   It offers recommendations on reconciling Electronic Credit Ledger balances, Electronic Cash Ledger balances, GST liabilities, ITC claims, and compliance under Reverse Charge Mechanism (RCM), TDS, and TCS provisions.
*   The Handbook also highlights the importance of reconciling books of accounts with GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-2B, e-Way Bills, and annual return disclosures.
*   A dedicated section addresses GST implications arising during the review of Balance Sheet items, such as Property, Plant & Equipment, and Inventories.
*   The ISBN for this edition is 978-81-947221-9-9.

This updated publication will serve as a valuable reference for Chartered Accountants, auditors, and finance professionals in strengthening GST compliance and improving the quality of financial reporting.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Handbook here](https://d3u3z98950q82m.cloudfront.net/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Handbook-on-Finalisation-of-Accounts-with-GST-Perspective-June-2026.pdf)

*Published on: 24 June 2026*
